items.summary: Add a search bar to the Shop page (frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx) that allows customers to filter the displayed product catalog in real time by product name or description. The search input should be prominently placed above the product grid, styled consistently with the Lunara Jewels visual theme (warm tones, no blue/purple). Filtering must be purely client-side against the already-loaded product list so that no backend changes are required. When no products match the search query, display a friendly empty-state message (e.g., 'No products found for your search. Try a different keyword or browse our full collection.'). Clearing the search input must restore the full product grid.
